name: GetVendorItemsResponseModel
description: GetVendorItemsResponseModel schema from MarginEdge Public API

vendorItemCode.description: Vendor’s item code or SKU identifying the item

centralVendorItemId.description: Unique identifier of this vendor item in MarginEdge (across all restaurant units/vendors)

vendorId.description: Unique identifier of the vendor within this restaurant unit

companyConceptProductId.description: Identifier of the product (unique within the company concept this restaurant belongs to) this item is assigned to in MarginEdge

vendorName.description: Name of the vendor in MarginEdge

centralVendorId.description: Unique identifier of the vendor centrally (across all restaurant units in MarginEdge)

nextPage.description: Unique key for the next page of results
